input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.12.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: any instance where a team’s score benefits by an intentional or unintentional error on the

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.12.3: Any instance where a team’s score benefits by an intentional or unintentional error on the
S.3.12.3 Any instance where a team’s score benefits by an intentional or unintentional error on the 
part of the students will be corrected on a case by case basis.

final_answer: Any instance where a team’s score benefits by an intentional or unintentional error on the part of the students will be corrected on a case by case basis.
